texto: Acknowledging that my biological imperative may not include the drive to procreate, that I just might be attracted to XX chromosomes instead of XY? That's so stupid-minor in comparison to the fact that I might actually be in love for the first time in my life. It's with a girl...so what? Lesbian, bisexual, whatever! Thus isn't about categorisation or chromosomes. This is about how I feel about another person.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kristen Zimmer que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Acknowledging that my biological imperative may not include the drive to procreate, that I just m…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, contemporary, lesbian, com foco em lesbian e lgbt.
